title: Stop applying AI to the old ways of working!
summary: Andrew Macvean from Google for Developers argues that organizations should not simply apply AI to existing workflows, as coding was never the real bottleneck. The position emphasizes rethinking entire development lifecycles and processes to be designed with and for AI from the ground up.
